content.title: L&G brings £50B liquidity funds onchain via Calastone tokenized network
content.summary: London-based Legal & General Asset Management is the latest global asset manager to expand distribution across blockchain networks and trading models.

content.title: ETH/BTC ratio hits 10-week high as Ether outpaces Bitcoin: Are new price highs next?
content.summary: Ether looks poised to gain a price advantage over BTC as the ETH/BTC ratio soars to a 10-week high.

content.title: Bitcoin can grow 'probably a lot bigger' than $30T+ gold market — Analysis
content.summary: New Bitcoin macro analysis found its "addressable market" surpassed the $38 trillion gold market cap, driven by geopolitical instability and financial sanctions.

content.title: Senator Elizabeth Warren questions Elon Musk about X Money
content.summary: The Massachusetts Democrat has been critical of private companies, including non-bank entities, issuing their own dollar-pegged stablecoins.

content.title: Bitcoin falls to lower support as analysts say markets are ignoring key Iran issue
content.summary: Bitcoin paused its rally toward new range highs while the S&P 500 came within an inch of a fresh year-to-date high, leading analysts to warn that traders are overconfident.

content.title: EIP-8105: A new design for Ethereum’s encrypted mempool
content.summary: EIP-8105 proposes a scheme-agnostic encrypted mempool for Ethereum, designed to hide transaction payloads until after inclusion and reduce harmful MEV.

content.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
content.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

content.title: UK FCA seeks feedback on guidance for crypto rules ahead of 2027 rollout
content.summary: The UK financial regulator has launched a consultation on crypto rules covering stablecoins, trading and staking ahead of a broader UK crypto regime expected to take effect in 2027.

content.title: Tom Lee says ‘mini crypto winter’ is over, sees Ether above $60K
content.summary: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee told Paris Blockchain Week that the recent crypto slump was a “mini crypto winter” and said Ether could climb above $60,000 over the next few years.

content.title: WLFI proposes unlock plan for 62 billion tokens with long lockups and burns
content.summary: The new proposal outlines multi-year lockups and opt-in token burn, as the Trump-linked DeFi platform responds to pressure over delayed liquidity access.
